name: Agent
search_hint: delegate work to a subagent
description: Launch a new agent

name: Artifact
search_hint: render an HTML or Markdown file to a claude.ai web page
description: Render an HTML or Markdown file to an Artifact \u2014 a default-private claude.ai web page the user can share with teammates.

name: AskUserQuestion
search_hint: prompt the user with a multiple-choice question
description: Asks the user multiple choice questions to gather information, clarify ambiguity, understand preferences, make decisions or offer them choices.

name: Bash
search_hint: execute shell commands

name: CronCreate
search_hint: schedule a recurring or one-shot prompt

name: CronDelete
search_hint: cancel a scheduled cron job

name: CronList
search_hint: list active cron jobs
description: Cancel a scheduled cron job by ID

name: DesignSync
search_hint: sync local design system components to a claude.ai/design project

name: Edit
search_hint: modify file contents in place
description: A tool for editing files

name: EnterPlanMode
search_hint: switch to plan mode to design an approach before coding
description: Requests permission to enter plan mode for complex tasks requiring exploration and design

name: EnterWorktree
search_hint: create an isolated git worktree and switch into it
description: Creates an isolated worktree (via git or configured hooks) and switches the session into it

name: ExitPlanMode
search_hint: present plan for approval and start coding (plan mode only)
description: Prompts the user to exit plan mode and start coding

name: ExitWorktree
search_hint: exit a worktree session and return to the original directory
description: Exits a worktree session created by EnterWorktree and restores the original working directory

name: Glob
search_hint: find files by name pattern or wildcard

name: Grep
search_hint: search file contents with regex (ripgrep)

name: LSP
search_hint: code intelligence (definitions, references, symbols, hover)

name: ListMcpResourcesTool
search_hint: list resources from connected MCP servers
description: Lists available resources from configured MCP servers.

name: Monitor
search_hint: watch, monitor, or keep an eye on a process/log/command \u2014 stream each stdout line as a live notification

name: NotebookEdit
search_hint: edit Jupyter notebook cells (.ipynb)

name: PowerShell
search_hint: execute Windows PowerShell commands

name: Projects
search_hint: read and write the session's attached claude.ai project

name: PushNotification
search_hint: send a notification to the user via terminal and optionally mobile
description: Send a notification to the user via their terminal and, when Remote Control is connected, also push to their mobile device

name: REPL
search_hint: execute JavaScript with programmatic tool access

name: Read
search_hint: read files, images, PDFs, notebooks

name: ReadMcpResourceDirTool
search_hint: list the children of an MCP directory resource
description: List the direct children of a directory resource on an MCP server.

name: ReadMcpResourceTool
search_hint: read a specific MCP resource by URI
description: Reads a specific resource from an MCP server.

name: RemoteTrigger
search_hint: manage scheduled cloud agent routines

name: ScheduleWakeup
search_hint: self-pace next iteration: pick a delay before resuming work or running the next /loop tick
description: Schedule when to resume work in /loop dynamic mode (always pass the `prompt` arg). Call before ending the turn to keep the loop alive; omit the call to end it.e

name: SendMessage
search_hint: send messages to agent teammates

name: SendUserFile
search_hint: deliver files (screenshots, reports, artifacts) to the user
description: Send one or more files to the user

name: SendUserMessage
search_hint: send a message to the user \u2014 your primary visible output channel

name: ShareOnboardingGuide
search_hint: upload ONBOARDING.md and get a team share link

name: ShowOnboardingRolePicker
search_hint: show the Cowork onboarding role picker

name: Skill
search_hint: invoke a slash-command skill

name: StructuredOutput
search_hint: return the final response as structured JSON
description: Return structured output in the requested format

name: TaskCreate
search_hint: create a task in the task list

name: TaskGet
search_hint: retrieve a task by ID

name: TaskList
search_hint: list all tasks

name: TaskOutput
search_hint: read output/logs from a background task
description: [Deprecated] \u2014 for bash and remote_agent tasks, prefer Read on the output file path; for local_agent tasks, use the Agent tool result directly

name: TaskStop
search_hint: kill a running background task
description: Stop a running background task by ID

name: TaskUpdate
search_hint: update a task

name: TodoWrite
search_hint: manage the session task checklist

name: WebFetch
search_hint: fetch and extract content from a URL
description: - Fetches content from a specified URL and processes it using an AI model

name: WebSearch
search_hint: search the web for current information

name: Workflow
search_hint: orchestrate subagents with deterministic JavaScript workflow

name: Write
search_hint: create or overwrite files
description: Write a file to the local filesystem.
